emotion_and_vibe: Calm, premium, magical, invisible automation. High clarity with zero visual noise. Apple-level polish with Notion-like functional beauty.

rules: No full-screen heavy gradients. Use subtle radial glows for emphasis if needed.
Hover state color must be a lighter hue of the active state color. ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
Never use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF) for borders. Always use semantic border colors like border-slate-200.
Ensure text meets APCA contrast standards. Dark mode surfaces must have subtle borders.
BANNED FONTS: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, Lato.
H1 Max size: text-4xl sm:text-5xl. Never exceed text-6xl for this context.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line Height: Tight (leading-none to leading-tight) for headers, Loose (leading-relaxed) for body.
Hierarchy Gap Rule: The jump between a heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical defaults to create breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID for dashboards. Use gap-6 or gap-8. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Every pixel must be utilized, no jagged bottoms.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content, forms, and tables. Center-align hero elements only.
spacing_and_layout.corners: rounded-2xl for main app containers, cards, and modals. rounded-lg or rounded-xl for inner elements like buttons and inputs.

surface_strategies.cards: Subtle Neumorphism/Crisp. 1px solid border (border-border) with soft ambient shadows (shadow-sm) in light mode. In dark mode, rely on 1px border with no heavy shadow, just slight elevation.
surface_strategies.headers: Glassmorphism (Crystal variant). Light: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50. Dark: bg-[#0B0B0F]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-800.
surface_strategies.widgets: Flat background, 1px subtle border. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-md).

strategy: Use Shadcn UI logic but heavily customize the look to remove the default 'Vercel' aesthetic.
Use Pure HTML/Tailwind for structural bento-grids rather than strict Shadcn Card wrappers if they constrain layout.
DO NOT use generic HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Use custom Shadcn accessible variants.
Empty states: Do not use generic images. Use large Phosphor Icons (size 48 or 64) with soft secondary colors.

rules: Minimalist micro-interactions for feedback (e.g., active states, button clicks).
Transition specific properties ONLY: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.
Implement staggered entrance animations for dashboard feed/list items.

user_avatar_1.description: Positive ethnic female entrepreneur avatar. Use for the primary user profile icon.

user_avatar_2.description: Professional man in suit avatar. Use for mock CRM contacts.

rules: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Format: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='upload-excel-button', data-testid='nav-settings-link', data-testid='automation-card-trigger'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup fonts immediately in index.html or global css: Google Fonts for Manrope (Headings) and IBM Plex Sans (Body).
2. Implement the color variables perfectly matching the user's hex codes in tailwind.config.js.
3. Build the Dashboard layout using the Mode B Grid Strategy (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4) to create a dense but highly breathable 'Control Room' feel.
4. Apply 'Crystal Glass' styles to floating headers or sticky navigation, ensuring content behind it is beautifully blurred (backdrop-blur-xl).
5. For the Excel File Upload and Automation Builder: Avoid cluttered UI. Keep it to a pristine, 3-step visible flow with generous padding.
6. Do not use placehold.it or dummyimage.com anywhere. Use the provided avatar URLs.
7. Include dark mode toggle functionality out of the box.
